use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and CTAs
Navigation triggers with multiple visual variants
Icon buttons for toolbars and action bars
Polymorphic buttons using Radix UI Slot composition
ai_summary: A Cult UI button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for polymorphic composition. Features 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Includes full accessibility support with focus-visible rings, disabled states, and keyboard navigation. Uses Tailwind CSS for styling and supports the asChild prop for slot-based composition into other components.
